style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura pulses gently around Vileplume's form, casting distorted shadows that stretch and warp unnaturally across the ground. Slow-drifting mist particles swirl in pale silver trails, while faint energy pulses glow through its translucent petals in deep indigo. The lighting mood is an eerie, cold blue-white ghost luminescence with subtle purple undertones, creating a hauntingly serene atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
